title: salix × abnormis
intro: Salix × abnormis, also known as the hybrid willow, is a type of deciduous shrub or small tree that belongs to the Salicaceae family. It is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to reduce pain and fight off infections. The health benefits of Salix × abnormis include its ability to help with stress relief, improve sleep quality, and reduce symptoms of anxiety and depression. Salix × abnormis can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
